items.name: 491-S26-TOO-MANY-COOKS
items.description: The practical capstone version of GAME491 gives senior-level GAME students the opportunity to apply their learned skills in programming, art, game design, and other disciplines to a long-term, team based game development project that aims to emulate real world game development practices in a classroom setting.

items.name: Role-Playing-Game-Character-Progression-Library
items.description: A Role-Playing Game Character Progression Library is a system that manages character growth in RPGs. It handles experience points, leveling, attributes, skills, and ability unlocks. It provides structured progression rules, supports customization, and ensures balanced, consistent gameplay development.

items.name: unitygen
